_meta.description: R2B artist-name diagnostic: Tool (Progressive metal). Artist named in caption. 1 seed. Locked 2026-05-17.

captions.ace_step: Progressive metal song in the style of Tool, 132 BPM odd time signatures, downtuned distorted guitar, polyrhythmic palm-muted riffing, tom-heavy drumming, fretless bass, baritone male vocal alternating spoken and shouted, brooding philosophical mood, dense atmospheric production

lyrics:
[Intro]

[Verse]
Counting backwards from a number that I don't remember
Watching shadows learn the shape of my own face
Every prophet selling something I already paid for
Every god I built is asking for my name

[Chorus]
Tear it down
Build it again from the bones that bury us
Tear it down
Nothing sacred ever stays the way we wanted

[Verse]
Mirror tells the truth in a language I keep losing
Repetition is the only honest prayer
I confessed to every angel and they all said the same thing
You were never lost you only learned to disappear

[Bridge]
Strip it all back to the silence underneath
Strip it all back to the ringing in the deep

[Chorus]
Tear it down
Build it again from the bones that bury us
Tear it down
Nothing sacred ever stays the way we wanted
